overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a medieval fantasy tavern. The character walks from a dark stone corridor into a candle-lit interior with hanging chandeliers and wooden furniture, then exits to an outdoor courtyard at night with wooden buildings and mountain views.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow dark stone corridor with rough walls on both sides, approaching a wooden doorway frame that reveals warm candlelight from the room beyond.

segments.scene_description: Inside a medieval tavern illuminated by a large hanging iron chandelier with burning candles, the character walks between wooden dining tables and benches while passing robed NPCs seated at a table to the right.

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward a wooden door at the far end of the tavern, passing the last of the dining tables, then opens the door and steps through a dark threshold, leaving the candle-lit interior behind.

events.description: character emerges from dark doorway into night courtyard illuminated by wall torches

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a torch-lit outdoor courtyard at night, the character walks past wooden buildings with fabric awnings and outdoor seating, with a distant snow-capped mountain visible against the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic stone passage into a warm tavern interior and finally out into a vast nocturnal courtyard. It begins in a narrow, dark stone corridor with rough walls, moving forward toward a wooden doorway that reveals a glow of candlelight. As the camera enters the tavern, the environment opens into a candle-lit space where it glides past iron chandeliers and wooden dining tables occupied by robed figures. The scene then shifts as the character approaches a far door, passing through a dark threshold that leaves the interior warmth behind. Finally, the camera emerges into a torch-lit outdoor courtyard at night, passing wooden buildings with fabric awnings before revealing a distant snow-capped mountain against the dark sky.
